scripts.dev: pnpm run setup && pnpm run preflight && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "pnpm run start:backend" "pnpm run start:frontend"
scripts.preflight: pnpm run check && pnpm run mongo:ensure && pnpm run seed
scripts.check: pnpm run build && pnpm run lint
scripts.build: pnpm run clean && pnpm --filter octofit-tracker-backend build && pnpm --filter octofit-tracker-frontend build
scripts.mongo:ensure: ps aux | grep mongod | grep -v grep | grep '/mongod' || brew services start mongodb/brew/mongodb-community
